name: Andrea Mytinger
title: Attending Physician
bio: Dr. Mytinger earned her medical degree from Western University of Health Sciences. She completed her residency at the University of New Mexico, and her fellowship at Virginia Commonwealth University. Dr. Mytinger is married with two children. She enjoys hiking, skiing, and being outdoors in her free time. Dr. Mytinger describes herself as a home fish aquarium enthusiast and crossword puzzle extraordinaire.
education: Western University of Health Sciences - COMP NW
